description: Prompts featuring animals (pets, wildlife, birds, insects, fish)
Prompts featuring humans (children, adults, workers, characters)
Prompts centered on inanimate household or generic objects
Prompts involving food or drink items
Prompts featuring cars, boats, planes, bikes, or other transport
Prompts involving architecture, rooms, or built structures
Prompts involving plants, landscapes, weather, or natural scenery
Scenes set inside a room, home, or enclosed space
Scenes set outside in open air or natural environments
City, street, or man-made public settings
Countryside, meadow, farm, or wilderness settings
Prompts emphasizing specific colors as salient attributes
Prompts emphasizing materials or textures (wood, metal, silk, etc.)
Prompts comparing sizes, lengths, or relative scale
Prompts referencing age (child, adult, old, young, puppy)
Still scenes with no motion or action described
Prompts depicting movement, activity, or dynamic events
Multiple people or agents interacting together
Prompts explicitly specifying spatial arrangement (behind, front, on top)
Prompts involving hiding, obscuring, or partial visibility
Prompts requiring specific numeric quantities of items
Scenes containing 3 or fewer distinct items
Scenes containing 4 to 6 distinct items
Scenes containing 7 or more distinct items
Prompts involving geometric shapes or abstract forms
